segments.text: After the death of Moses the servant of the Lord, it came to pass that the Lord spoke to Joshua the son of Nun, Moses' assistant, saying:
Moses My servant is dead. Now therefore, arise, go over this Jordan, you and all this people, to the land which I am giving to them—the children of Israel.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Every place that the sole of your foot will tread upon I have given you, as I said to Moses.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: From the wilderness and this Lebanon as far as the great river, the River Euphrates, all the land of the Hittites, and to the Great Sea toward the going down of the sun, shall be your territory.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: No man shall be able to stand before you all the days of your life; as I was with Moses, so I will be with you. I will not leave you nor forsake you.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Be strong and of good courage, for to this people you shall divide as an inheritance the land which I swore to their fathers to give them.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Only be strong and very courageous, that you may observe to do according to all the law which Moses My servant commanded you; do not turn from it to the right hand or to the left, that you may prosper wherever you go.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: This Book of the Law shall not depart from your mouth, but you shall meditate in it day and night, that you may observe to do according to all that is written in it. For then you will make your way prosperous, and then you will have good success.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Have I not commanded you? Be strong and of good courage; do not be afraid, nor be dismayed, for the Lord your God is with you wherever you go.
segments.speaker: The LORD

verses.title: The Order to Cross the Jordan

segments.text: Then Joshua commanded the officers of the people, saying,
Pass through the camp and command the people, saying,
Prepare provisions for yourselves, for within three days you will cross over this Jordan, to go in to possess the land which the Lord your God is giving you to possess.
segments.speaker: Joshua

segments.text: And to the Reubenites, the Gadites, and half the tribe of Manasseh Joshua spoke, saying,
Remember the word which Moses the servant of the Lord commanded you, saying, 'The Lord your God is giving you rest and is giving you this land.'
segments.speaker: Joshua

segments.text: Your wives, your little ones, and your livestock shall remain in the land which Moses gave you on this side of the Jordan. But you shall pass before your brethren armed, all your mighty men of valor, and help them,
segments.speaker: Joshua

segments.text: until the Lord has given your brethren rest, as He gave you, and they also have taken possession of the land which the Lord your God is giving them. Then you shall return to the land of your possession and enjoy it, which Moses the Lord's servant gave you on this side of the Jordan toward the sunrise.
segments.speaker: Joshua

segments.text: All that you command us we will do, and wherever you send us we will go.
segments.speaker: The People

segments.text: Just as we heeded Moses in all things, so we will heed you. Only the Lord your God be with you, as He was with Moses.
segments.speaker: The People

segments.text: Whoever rebels against your command and does not heed your words, in all that you command him, shall be put to death. Only be strong and of good courage.
segments.speaker: The People
